description: 40 hand-verified queries against novagrid_report.pdf and Ecommerce_purchases_Item_name.pdf.

examples.question: When was NovaGrid Energy Solutions founded and where?
examples.expected_answer: NovaGrid was founded in 2011 in Portland, Oregon.

examples.question: Who founded NovaGrid?
examples.expected_answer: Engineers Daniela Ferro and Marcus Whitlock founded NovaGrid.

examples.question: What products does NovaGrid manufacture?
examples.expected_answer: Battery storage systems, solar inverters, and smart grid management software.

examples.question: How many employees did NovaGrid have at the end of fiscal 2025?
examples.expected_answer: 1,842 employees across four countries.

examples.question: In which countries does NovaGrid operate?
examples.expected_answer: United States, Canada, Germany, and Japan.

examples.question: Where is NovaGrid's European logistics hub?
examples.expected_answer: Rotterdam, Netherlands, opened in 2022.

examples.question: What is NovaGrid's mission statement?
examples.expected_answer: To make clean, reliable energy storage accessible to every household and business.

examples.question: What is the storage capacity of NovaCell Home 10?
examples.expected_answer: 10 kWh with a starting price of $7,999.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid's best-selling product in fiscal 2025?
examples.expected_answer: NovaCell Home 20, accounting for 41% of unit sales.

examples.question: How many GridPilot Software subscribers did NovaGrid have by December 2025?
examples.expected_answer: 58,000 active subscribers.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid total revenue in fiscal year 2025?
examples.expected_answer: $412.6 million, up 18% from 2024.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid net income in fiscal 2025?
examples.expected_answer: $37.9 million.

examples.question: How much did NovaGrid spend on R&D in 2025?
examples.expected_answer: $35.7 million.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid's largest expense category in 2025?
examples.expected_answer: Manufacturing and materials at $198.3 million.

examples.question: When did NovaGrid open its Reno manufacturing plant?
What is the starting price of NovaCell Home 20?
What commercial battery product does NovaGrid offer and at what capacity?
examples.expected_answer: NovaGrid Commercial X at 100 kWh, starting at $62,000.

examples.question: When was the SolarSync Inverter II launched?
examples.expected_answer: 2023 at $1,850 starting price.

examples.question: What share buyback program did NovaGrid's board approve?
examples.expected_answer: A $50 million share buyback program in November 2025.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid revenue in fiscal 2023?
examples.expected_answer: $302.1 million.

examples.question: What analytics report source shows ecommerce item names?
examples.expected_answer: Wilco Farmstore Analytics ecommerce purchases by item name.

examples.question: What date range does the ecommerce purchases report cover?
examples.expected_answer: July 14, 2026 (single day custom range).

examples.question: How many total items were viewed in the ecommerce report?
examples.expected_answer: 4,503 items viewed.

examples.question: How many items were purchased according to the ecommerce report?
examples.expected_answer: 18 items purchased.

examples.question: What was total item revenue in the ecommerce purchases report?
What is the top viewed item in the ecommerce purchases report?
examples.expected_answer: Cornerstone Plus Glyphosate Herbicide, 2.5 gal.

examples.question: Which RuffWear product appears in the top ecommerce items list?
examples.expected_answer: RuffWear Black Grip Trex Dog Shoes and Blue Pool Front Range Dog Harness among others.

examples.question: How many items were added to cart in the ecommerce report?
examples.expected_answer: 172 items added to cart.

examples.question: What Weatherbeeta dog coat appears in the ecommerce top items?
examples.expected_answer: Weatherbeeta Orange ComFiTec Reflective 300D Deluxe Showerproof Dog Coat.

examples.question: What pine shavings product is listed in the ecommerce report?
examples.expected_answer: KSHOW ShowFlake White Pine Shavings, 12 cu ft.

examples.question: Compare NovaGrid 2024 and 2025 revenue growth.
examples.expected_answer: Revenue grew from $349.5M in 2024 to $412.6M in 2025, an 18% increase.

examples.question: What subscription product does NovaGrid sell monthly?
examples.expected_answer: GridPilot Software at $49/month.

examples.question: How many rows are in the ecommerce item name report table?
examples.expected_answer: 255,410 rows total (paginated 1-10 shown).

examples.question: What pet product brand appears multiple times in ecommerce top items?
examples.expected_answer: RuffWear appears multiple times with harnesses, shoes, and packs.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid net income in 2022?
examples.expected_answer: $15.6 million.

examples.question: What layer feed product appears in the ecommerce list?
examples.expected_answer: Scratch & Peck Naturally Free Layer Mash, 40 lb.

examples.question: When was NovaGrid's mission statement adopted?
What K&H Pet Products item is in the ecommerce top ten?
examples.expected_answer: K & H Pet Products Charcoal Original Pet Cot - Medium, Gray.

examples.question: What percentage of ecommerce views did the top herbicide item represent?
examples.expected_answer: 21 views representing 0.47% of total views.

examples.question: What was NovaGrid sales and marketing spend category size in 2025?
examples.expected_answer: Sales and marketing was $89.4 million, the second largest expense.
